+package java.lang;
+
+/**
+ * Indicates a type supports the basic binary arithmetic operations as
+ * well as the ordered comparison operations.
+ *
+ * @param <ON> The ordered numerical type
+ */
+public interface OrderedNumerical<ON>
+    extends Numerical<ON>, Orderable<ON> {
+}
